title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Orient Electric

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Orient Electric
jsonLd.description:
We at Orient Electric are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Orient Electric:
Orient Electric is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Orient Electric!
